name: Non-alcoholic fatty liver disease
description: Accumulation of fat in the liver not caused by alcohol, linked to high fructose and processed food consumption.

name: Type 2 Diabetes
description: Chronic condition affecting sugar metabolism, strongly linked to ultra-processed food diets.

name: Chronic Kidney Disease
description: Progressive loss of kidney function, exacerbated by high sodium and preservative intake.

name: Hypertension
description: High blood pressure strongly linked to excessive sodium and processed food consumption.

name: Migraines
description: Severe headaches triggered by certain food additives including MSG, aspartame, and artificial colors.

name: Gastritis
description: Inflammation of the stomach lining, aggravated by preservatives and acidic additives.

name: Irritable Bowel Syndrome
description: Chronic gut condition triggered by emulsifiers and artificial additives.

name: Asthma
description: Respiratory condition linked to sulfite preservatives and certain food dyes.
